property.name: alertTitle
property.label: Alert Modal Title to show that country switchng is restricted cause of Customer Specific Promotions

property.name: alertMessage
property.default: Cannot change your locale at this moment as your Account has auto applied customer specific promotions.
property.label: Alert Modal Message to show that country switchng is restricted cause of Customer Specific Promotions

property.name: alertTheme
property.label: Alert Modal Theme to show that country switchng is restricted cause of Customer Specific Promotions
